name: Roquefort, Pear and Watercress Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons strong brewed tea (preferably Earl Grey)
1 tablespoon white-wine vinegar or Champagne vinegar
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
3 cups washed, dried, and torn red leaf lettuce
1 ripe pear (preferably red), cored and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together tea, vinegar, oil, shallots, mustard, salt, and pepper.
- This mixture can be prepared up to 2 days in advance and stored in the refrigerator.
2. In a large bowl, toss lettuce and watercress together with the dressing.
3. Divide the salad among four plates, arranging the pear slices over the lettuce mixture.
4. Sprinkle crumbled Roquefort cheese and chopped toasted walnuts on top.
5. Garnish with a grinding of black pepper.
